zh.lifeSummary: 當Johann Georg Vogelgesang於大約1665年出生時，他的父親Henrich Ludwig Vogelgesang22歲，母親Cecilia Hüter20歲。他於1699年10月6日與Johanna Katharina Thielheim在德國薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯格斯海姆盧本海姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1743年1月6日在德國薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯格斯海姆賀比海姆享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johann Georg Vogelgesang于大约1665年出生时，他的父亲Henrich Ludwig Vogelgesang22岁，母亲Cecilia Hüter20岁。他于1699年10月6日与Johanna Katharina Thielheim在德国薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯格斯海姆盧本海姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1743年1月6日在德国薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯格斯海姆賀比海姆享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Vogelgesang

variants.name: Vogelsang
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ingo, Kurt, Bernd, Dieter, Erwin, Fritz, Gerhard, Gunther, Joerg, Otto, Willi.
German: habitational name from any of several places called Vogelsang all over Germany; or a topographic name from a field name. Compare   Birdsong  .

nameMeanings.name: Johann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: Georg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When Johann Georg Vogelgesang was born about 1665, his father, Henrich Ludwig Vogelgesang, was 22 and his mother, Cecilia Hüter, was 20. He married Johanna Katharina Thielheim on 6 October 1699, in Rubenheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germany. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 6 January 1743, in Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germany, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johann Georg Vogelgesang est né environ 1665, son père, Henrich Ludwig Vogelgesang, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Cecilia Hüter, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Johanna Katharina Thielheim le 6 octobre 1699, à Rubenheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, La Sarre, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 6 janvier 1743, à Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, La Sarre, Allemagne, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johann Georg Vogelgesang um 1665 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henrich Ludwig Vogelgesang 22 und seine Mutter Cecilia Hüter 20. Er hat am 6. Oktober 1699 in Rubenheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Deutschland Johanna Katharina Thielheim geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 6. Januar 1743 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johann Georg Vogelgesang è nato il circa 1665, il suo padre, Henrich Ludwig Vogelgesang, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Cecilia Hüter, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Johanna Katharina Thielheim il 6 ottobre 1699, nel Rubenheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 6 gennaio 1743, nel Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germania, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Johann Georg Vogelgesangが約1665年に生まれた時，父Henrich Ludwig Vogelgesangは22歳，母Cecilia Hüterは20歳であった。1699年10月6日にドイツサアルランドサアルプファルズ-クレイスジャーシェイムルベンヘイムでJohanna Katharina Thielheimと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1743年1月6日にドイツサアルランドサアルプファルズ-クレイスジャーシェイムハービトズヘイムで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Johann Georg Vogelgesang(이)가 대략 1665년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henrich Ludwig Vogelgesang(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecilia Hüter(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1699년 10월 6일 독일 사알랜드 사아르p팔즈-크레이스 그르셰임 루벤하임에서 Johanna Katharina Thielheim(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1743년 1월 6일 독일 사알랜드 사아르p팔즈-크레이스 그르셰임 허비츠하임에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johann Georg Vogelgesang nasceu aproximadamente 1665, seu pai, Henrich Ludwig Vogelgesang, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Cecilia Hüter, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanna Katharina Thielheim em 6 de outubro de 1699, em Rubenheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de janeiro de 1743, em Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemanha, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johann Georg Vogelgesang родился около 1665 г., его отцу по имени Henrich Ludwig Vogelgesang было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Cecilia Hüter, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna Katharina Thielheim 6 октября 1699 г. в местности рубеним, джиршим, саарпфалз-крис, саарланд, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 6 января 1743 г. в местности хирбицхим, джиршим, саарпфалз-крис, саарланд, Германия в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johann Georg Vogelgesang nació aproximadamente 1665, su papá, Henrich Ludwig Vogelgesang, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Cecilia Hüter, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Johanna Katharina Thielheim el 6 de octubre de 1699, en Rubenheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 6 de enero de 1743, en Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemania, a la edad de 79 años.
